From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Israeli Defense Forces' reserve-service infantry Brigade

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/80/IDF_Brigade_55_Tag.svg/250px-IDF_Brigade_55_Tag.svg.png)](/wiki/File:IDF_Brigade_55_Tag.svg)

IDF Brigade 55 symbol

**55th Paratroopers Brigade**, also known as "*Tip of The Spear Brigade*" ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): עֻצְבַּת חוד החנית, *Utzbat Hod Ha-Hanit*), is a reserve paratrooper brigade in the [Israeli Defense Forces](/wiki/Israeli_Defense_Forces "Israeli Defense Forces") (IDF) that specialized in airborne operations, anti-irregular military, counterinsurgency, CQB/CQC in urban areas, desert warfare, long-range penetration, maneuver warfare, raiding with small unit tactics, and special reconnaissance.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=55th_Paratroopers_Brigade_(Israel)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3b/An_Israeli_unit_of_parachutists_lining_up_in_front_of_nord_transport_planes_destined_to_go_into_actlion_in_Sinai%2C_last_minute_change_orders_were_deirected_to_Jerusalem._June_1967._D327-061.jpg/250px-thumbnail.jpg)](/wiki/File:An_Israeli_unit_of_parachutists_lining_up_in_front_of_nord_transport_planes_destined_to_go_into_actlion_in_Sinai,_last_minute_change_orders_were_deirected_to_Jerusalem._June_1967._D327-061.jpg)

Paratroopers of 55th Brigade lining up for action in Sinai, June 1967

The 55th Paratroopers Brigade is subordinate to the [98th Paratroopers Division](/wiki/98th_Paratroopers_Division "98th Paratroopers Division").

The brigade is an airborne forces unit within the IDF which over the years has taken part in a number of the IDF operations, including the [Battle of Ammunition Hill](/wiki/Battle_of_Ammunition_Hill "Battle of Ammunition Hill") during the [Six-Day War](/wiki/Six-Day_War "Six-Day War"), [Operation Stoutehearted Men](/wiki/Operation_Abirey-Halev "Operation Abirey-Halev") during the [Yom Kippur War](/wiki/Yom_Kippur_War "Yom Kippur War"),[[2]](#cite_note-2) the [1982 Lebanon War](/wiki/1982_Lebanon_War "1982 Lebanon War") and the [2006 Lebanon War](/wiki/2006_Lebanon_War "2006 Lebanon War").

The 55th is famous specifically for being the first Israeli brigade into the [Old City](/wiki/Old_City_(Jerusalem) "Old City (Jerusalem)") of [Jerusalem](/wiki/Jerusalem "Jerusalem") in 1967[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4) and the first to cross the Suez Canal in 1973.[[5]](#cite_note-5)

After [Hamas](/wiki/Hamas "Hamas")' [October 7 attacks](/wiki/October_7_attacks "October 7 attacks") on Israel, the Brigade fought in [Kfar Aza](/wiki/Kfar_Aza "Kfar Aza"), rescuing Israelis from their safe rooms, before eventually clearing the bodies of the [Kfar Aza massacre](/wiki/Kfar_Aza_massacre "Kfar Aza massacre"). Later in the war it was one the forces which led the IDF operation in [Khan Younis](/wiki/Khan_Yunis "Khan Yunis"),[[6]](#cite_note-6) as well as the ground offensive against the [Hezbollah](/wiki/Hezbollah "Hezbollah") terror group in [Lebanon](/wiki/Lebanon "Lebanon").[[7]](#cite_note-7)

In November 2025 soldiers from the Brigade were injured while arresting [Al-Jama'a al-Islamiyya](/wiki/Al-Jama%27a_al-Islamiyya "Al-Jama'a al-Islamiyya") leaders in a raid in [Beit Jinn](/wiki/Beit_Jinn "Beit Jinn"), [Syria](/wiki/Syria "Syria").[[8]](#cite_note-8)[[9]](#cite_note-9)

### Brigade organization 2025

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=55th_Paratroopers_Brigade_(Israel)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Brigade organization 2025")]

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/80/IDF_Brigade_55_Tag.svg/40px-IDF_Brigade_55_Tag.svg.png)](/wiki/File:IDF_Brigade_55_Tag.svg) **55th Paratroopers Brigade "Hod Ha-Hanit/Tip of The Spear"** (Reserve)
  + 2855th Paratroopers Battalion
  + 6655th Paratroopers Battalion
  + 7155th Paratroopers Battalion
  + (6623rd) Reconnaissance Battalion "Hod Ha-Hanit"
  + 5055th Logistic Battalion
  + Signal Company
